parameters-en.Speed: Controls the speed or rate of the flanger. When set to note values, Speed follows the system tempo.
parameters-en.Width: Controls how wide and dramatic the flanging sweep appears.
parameters-en.Regen: Controls the amount of feedback in the effected signal.
parameters-en.Manual: Controls the degree of phase shifting. Has no effect when Width is set to 100%.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
